name: manual-jes-review
description: Surface manual JEs in a period for controller review.
input_message: Show me all manual journal entries posted in May 2026 — anything that needs review?
expected_behavior: Calls journals-queue-review (which uses sap_list_journal_entries with period='2026-05' and type='Manual'). Returns line-level detail for JE-30099 — a single $480,000 manual T&E adjustment with no offsetting source. Flags it as audit risk (round number, manual, no source).
